hero.title: I build software that moves money.
hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer at Veepag, a Brazilian payments startup. Available for remote work, worldwide.

work.title: Work
work.subtitle: From first commit to production fintech
work.currentDescription: One of the first engineers at Veepag, a Brazilian payments startup processing R$5M+ in monthly volume. I own architecture, APIs, and the product customers actually touch.
work.journeyDescription: I've been building software since 2021. Since then I've shipped for clients across Brazil, Germany, and the UK — and grown from writing features to owning architecture and technical decisions.

veepag.description: Second engineer at a Brazilian payments startup processing R$5M+ in monthly volume. I own architecture, APIs, and the KYC and payment flows running in production.

ddc.description: Owned analytics end-to-end at a fintech serving brokers and investors. Designed and shipped BI modules that turned raw market data into the indicators leadership used to track results and steer decisions. Built full-stack on a BFF architecture and owned the PostgreSQL layer beneath it — data modeling and query tuning that kept the dashboards fast as the data grew.

borderless.description: Led a three-developer team at Borderless, a London-based engineering collective. I set the project scope, ran the dailies, and kept the team shipping — and we delivered a job-tracking application. I owned the most demanding frontend work myself, including a NeetCode-style coding platform.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: The tools I reach for to ship and scale.

items.funding: Account funding — built the credit top-up flow, the path users take to fund their balance.
items.invoicing: Invoicing — shipped automated invoice emission for platform transactions.
items.kyc: KYC onboarding — built identity verification so the platform onboards users compliantly.
items.review: Periodic registration review — automated recurring re-verification of user records, with no manual work.
items.frontend: Frontend architecture — introduced a new TypeScript pattern that made the frontend more type-safe, consistent, and faster to build on.
items.reliability: Platform reliability — own the day-to-day maintenance and stability of the production system.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Beyond the code
about.intro: I care about software that solves real problems, not just code that runs. I think about the business, make deliberate architecture decisions, and ship things that hold up in production.
about.polyglot: Senior enough to own the hard calls, hands-on enough to ship them. I work async, communicate clearly, and treat your deadlines as mine.
about.passion: Off the clock I train Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and I'm a dad — both are daily practice in patience and incremental progress.

contact.title: Let's connect
contact.subtitle: Open to remote contracts and full-time roles.
contact.languages: Open to remote contracts and full-time roles. I work in English, Portuguese, and German.
